message:
fix(engine): continue replacing nightly-only is_multiple_of and saturating_add across 17 more files

Second pass of the same cross-cutting correctness sweep. Concurrent agents
introduced more uses of the nightly-only u64::is_multiple_of() and
usize::is_multiple_of() methods since the first commit. This batch covers:

- benchmark_evidence_bundle: median calculation parity check
- capability_witness: checkpoint interval check
- closure_model: saturating_add → checked_add for scope handle counter
- golden_vectors: hex string length validation
- seqlock_fastpath: sequence number parity checks (write-lock detection)
- succinct_witness_compiler: Merkle proof sibling index calculation
- incident_replay_bundle, replacement_lineage_log: serialization expect()
- And 9 more modules with the same is_multiple_of → % N == 0 pattern

Also replaces remaining saturating_add calls with checked_add().expect()
where silent saturation could mask capacity bugs (closure_model scope handles).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
